meta.title: Matheus Gaspar — Software Engineer
meta.description: Portfolio of Matheus Gaspar, a software engineer focused on data products and modern, performant and accessible web applications.

hero.name: Matheus Gaspar
hero.tagline: I build modern web applications and data products with a focus on performance, accessibility and user experience.

about.title: About me
paragraphs: I'm a software engineer passionate about turning data and ideas into useful digital products. I work end to end — from interface design to back-end architecture.
I have experience with the Vue/Nuxt ecosystem, TypeScript and data platforms, always prioritizing clean, testable and maintainable code.
I believe great software comes from caring about the details: accessibility, performance and a consistent experience for everyone.

skills.title: Skills
skills.subtitle: Tools and technologies I use day to day to build solid products.

items.description: Building financial data automation and reconciliation products, focusing on scalability and user experience.
Worked on end-to-end web applications, API integrations and performance optimization across different business domains.
